summary: Final drift audit: no architectural drift after packet 24. Project complete. All 18 API contracts, 6 database tables, 46 CSS design tokens, and keyboard accessibility features match the spec. 482/482 tests pass. Packet 24 (Keyboard Accessibility) landed cleanly with no scope creep. All 6 carryover items (is_valid_repo unused, 3x hardcoded #fff, last_quick_scan_at unwritten, 2x transparent freshness borders, --radius-lg unreferenced) are trivial/cosmetic. 26 packets validated across 10 drift audits with 0 halts.
notes: This is the final drift audit for the completed project. full_suite_state.json remains stale (records packet 17, actual last full-suite run in this audit: 482/482 at packet 24). drift_audit_state.json updated by this audit. C6 (--radius-lg) was reserved for packet 24 focus rings but packet 24 used outline instead — now permanently unused but trivial. Test count 482 vs packet 24 validation's 476: 6 additional tests from unstaged working-directory changes (C1 VCS hygiene). No new findings. Project architecturally sound.
